results.test_desc: Ensure that the --anonymous-auth argument is set to false
results.remediation: Edit the API server pod specification file and set --anonymous-auth=false.

results.test_desc: Ensure that the --kubelet-certificate-authority argument is set as appropriate
results.remediation: Follow the Kubernetes documentation and setup the TLS connection between the apiserver and kubelets.

results.test_desc: Ensure that the --anonymous-auth argument is set to false
results.remediation: If using a Kubelet config file, edit it to set authentication.anonymous.enabled to false.
